title: Croatian Chorizo Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry recipe combining the spicy flavors of Croatian chorizo with the crunch of savory and crisp ingredients.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced chorizo and cook for 2-3 minutes, until browned.
Add the chopped savory greens, sliced bell peppers, and minced garlic to the skillet.
Cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Spray with cooking spray to prevent sticking.
Serve hot, garnished with additional savory greens if desired.
